Entries.Introduction: Oh! So you're the new guy, huh? Nice! I'm Naruto Uzumaki!^Hey! You're the new girl, huh? Awesome! I think we're gonna get along great. I'm Naruto Uzumaki!#$e#See you around! Believe it!
Entries.FlowerDance_Accept: Haha, you beat me to it! I was just about to ask you...$h#$e#I'll see you out there!
Entries.AcceptBirthdayGift_Loved: Whoa!! This is awesome... Thanks for the birthday gift, @!$h
Entries.AcceptBirthdayGift_Negative: Huh...? What the...? I mean... thanks, but this is pretty weird.$a
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)Book_Defense: Aw, yeah... I've been wanting to read more training stuff lately. Maybe there's something useful in here! Thanks!$h
Entries.AcceptGift_Negative_book_item: Uhhh... reading? Yeah, um... I guess I can give it a try.$s
Entries.AcceptGift_(TR)FrogEgg: Umm... I know I eat some weird stuff sometimes... But this isn't what I meant...$s#$b#Oh well... down the hatch! *gulp*$h
Entries.AcceptGift_(TR)ParrotEgg: Can you eat this?$s#$b#I guess there's only one way to find out...
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)928: Hehe... Keep giving me these every day, and maybe I can afford ramen for life!$h
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)107: Now that's what I call an egg! Imagine how much food you could make with this...
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)289: Whoaa... It's so heavy I could use it for training! I'll be eating this for a week! Hah hah!$h
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)442: Mmm... Duck egg... Rich and creamy. *crack*... *slurp*. Ahhhh...
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)305: Oh... um... I usually like trying stuff, but this one looks kinda evil.$s
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)403: *crunch*... Mmm... Nuts. That really hits the spot. Thanks, @!$h
Entries.AcceptGift_Positive_category_egg: $c 0.8#Hey, thanks! Eggs are great when you're training hard.#*crack*... *sluuurp*... Mmmm. Now that's what I call a snack.
Entries.cc_Bridge: Have you been up by the lake recently? I was out training late last night, and I noticed that the old bridge was repaired...
Entries.eventSeen_288847: Uh... I'm not really used to opening up like that...$s
Entries.fishCaught_159: Heard you caught some kind of rare fish?#$b#I'm impressed. You're stronger than you look!$h
Entries.purchasedAnimal_Chicken_memory_oneday: Hey, I overheard someone saying that you got your first chicken the other day.#$b#Man... that's awesome. I could eat a ton of eggs after training!
Entries.eventSeen_288847_memory_oneweek: Hey... uh... @? I... feel a lot more at peace after talking to you on the beach last week.$s#$b#Thanks for listening to me.$s
Entries.fishCaught_139: I saw you catch that salmon.#$b#If you make some food out of it, let me have a bite!
Entries.firstVisit_BathHouse_MensLocker_memory_o: I saw you checking out the bath house the other day. Trying to get stronger? Heh.#$e#Uh... you didn't go poking around in my locker, did you?$9
Entries.GreenRain: What's going on out there? Any action?#$e#I gotta stay here with my grandparents...$s
Entries.GreenRain_2: I tried to go out training this morning, but the plants have gone crazy! I couldn't get very far...
Entries.dating_Alex: %Naruto gives your arm a squeeze, grinning.
Entries.dating_Alex_memory_oneday: Well, this is a %season I'll never forget!$l
Entries.married_Haley: You got Haley to marry you, huh? Wow... didn't see that coming!
Entries.Resort_Leaving: Aw... I guess it can't last forever.$s
Entries.Resort_Wander: I knew I shoulda brought something fun to do... Oh well.$h
Entries.Resort_Wander_2: I wonder if anyone would be up for a volleyball tournament.#$e#Don't worry, I'll go easy!$h
Entries.Resort_Shore: I wonder how far I could swim out, and still make it back?#$e#I'm guessing pretty far.#$b#... Don't worry, I'm not actually gonna try it.$h
Entries.Resort_Chair: Aren't you hot in that outfit? C'mon... It's the beach!^Aren't you hot in that outfit? You gotta get some ocean breeze goin'!
Entries.Resort_Towel: With this island open, there's no excuse to stay pale anymore!
Entries.Resort_Towel_2: Phew, it feels good to finally get some sunlight.#$e#Kinda a shame to stay hidden away all the time back home.
Entries.Resort_Towel_3: When I become Hokage, I'll vacation on islands all around the world.#$e#But for now, this place is pretty great!$h
Entries.Resort_Bar: I'm ordering something cold... and maybe a big meal after this.$h
Entries.Resort: Ah... The island life. I could get used to this!
Entries.FlowerDance_Accept_Spouse: Okay, this should be fun... I hope I can remember the moves this year! It's been a while...$h
Entries.FlowerDance_Decline: Ah... I'm gonna ask someone else. Good luck.
Entries.divorced: I thought we had something special... I guess I was wrong.$s
Entries.secondChance_Guys: I don't know if I can trust you anymore, but I'm willing to give you another chance.$9
Entries.breakUp: You're giving me wha...?$7#$b#*huff*... Got it. Alright... well, you've made your choice. But don't expect me to beg.$a
Entries.Mon: Did you know I'm gonna become Hokage someday? It's true.$u#$e#You might laugh now, but you'll see.
Entries.Tue: The beach is a cool place to hang out and soak up some rays.#$e#You gotta spend some time in the sun or else you'll get all pale.#$e#*sigh*... I wish there were more people around who liked to train as hard as I do.$s^Hey, do you wanna hang out with me at the beach some time?
Entries.Wed: Looks like a good day to train, huh?$u#$e#$q 5/6 Wed_01_old#I'd ask you to train with me, but you don't really seem like the action type.^If you weren't so busy, I'd ask you to train with me.#$r 6 0 Wed_01_02#I'm fine just watching you from a distance.#$r 5 15 Wed_01_01#I want to train with you!#$r 5 0 Wed_01_03#(angry) What's that supposed to mean?
Entries.Wed_01_old: #$p 5#Go long! ...just kidding. Hahaha.|I just wish I had someone to train with sometimes...$s
Entries.Wed_01_01: Really? Hah, I guess I underestimated you.#$b#My arm's a little sore, but maybe next time.
Entries.Wed_01_02: Yeah, some people just aren't made for this stuff.
Entries.Thu: The air's starting to warm up... I'm feeling pumped.
Entries.Fri: Hey, what's up farmer guy?^Hey, it's farm girl. Did you do something different? You're doing something right.#$e#Oh, I almost forgot! It's my day for training!#$e#Every time I train I try to push a little harder than last time. Pretty cool strategy, huh?
Entries.Sat: My arms are really sore, but that's the sign of progress for a guy like me.#$e#I must've done a thousand push-ups yesterday.
Entries.Sun: Hey.#$e#What, you wanna talk to me? I'm busy.
Entries.Sun2: Hey, @.#$e#That's right, I remember your name.
Entries.Fri4: Hey, @. I'm glad you stopped by.#$e#I'm not ashamed to say that I love my grandma!#$e#Now Grandpa, on the other hand...#$e#Just kidding.$h
Entries.Tue6: Nothing's better than an energetic day at the beach with your friends... right?
Entries.Mon8: You know, I used to want fame and recognition more than anything, but lately I've been starting to think differently. In the end it's the humble little things that really matter, don't you think?#$e#I still want to become Hokage, but it's not the only important thing in the world.
Entries.Fri8: Hi @. You look ready for anything today.$h^Hey @. Did you do something different? Something keeps grabbing my attention.$h
Entries.Sat10: I've been having a hard time staying focused lately.$l
Entries.Event_beach1: Of course you do. If you didn't I'd think you were crazy. Or some kind of weird loner.
Entries.Event_beach2: Really? You must be some kind of weirdo.$a#$b#Sorry.
Entries.Event_books1: No, I'm not! You're just trying to flatter me.$a
Entries.Event_books3: You were supposed to disagree with me.$a
Entries.event_box1: Yes... I know. That's why I've been so determined to become someone important...$9#$b#Whether I make it or not... As long as I try my hardest, I think she'd be proud. Thanks.
Entries.event_box2: Wow... It's the anniversary of my parents' death! Have a heart...$a
Entries.event_box3: ...Thanks, @.#$b#You... you're different than a lot of people around here. More understanding.$l^You've become my best friend in the whole town... #$b#I'm glad.^Is that embarrassing to say?$l
Entries.event_box4: That doesn't make me feel any better, jerk.$a
Entries.summer_1: Hey. Summer is definitely one of the best times of year.#$e#Right now is great because we've got the whole season to look forward to. Catch you later.
Entries.summer_Mon: Hey, farmer guy. You look a little burnt.^Hey Farmer girl. You've got a nice tan going.$h#$e#The more I train this summer, the easier it'll be for me to reach my goal.#$e#Then you'd be able to say you knew me once. Cool, huh?
Entries.summer_Tue: If my hair wasn't such a big part of how people recognize me, I swear I'd shave it all off in a second.#$e#*sigh*... Life can be tough.
Entries.summer_Wed: Hey farm guy, I've got a question for you.^Hey Farm girl, I've got a question for you.#$b#$q 52/53 summer_Wed_01_old#Do you think I'll ever become Hokage?#$r 52 30 summer_Wed_01_01#You're destined to become Hokage#$r 52 0 summer_Wed_01_02#Maybe, if you train a lot#$r 53 -50 summer_Wed_01_03#No, you'll probably never make it
Entries.summer_Wed_01_old: $p 52#Hey, when I become Hokage you can say you were one of my first supporters. Not bad, huh?|Hey, I've been training twice as hard so I can prove you wrong. You just wait.$a
Entries.summer_Wed_01_01: Hey, now that's what I'm talking about!$h#$e#You're cooler than I thought.
Entries.summer_Wed_01_02: Yeah, well I'm good... but I know I still have to work hard.$u
Entries.summer_Wed_01_03: That's insane. You're just jealous that I've got what it takes and you don't.$a^That's ridiculous. You're just jealous that I'll be remembered and you won't.$a#$e#Get away from me.$a
Entries.summer_Thu: Hey, you must be getting pretty strong working on that farm all day.^Hey, you must be getting pretty fit working on that farm all day.#$e#Maybe you'll reach my level some day. Something to look forward to, huh?#$e#Why do you have that look on your face?
Entries.summer_Fri: What do you want?#$e#I've got more important things to do right now.
Entries.summer_Sat: Mmmm... I smell a barbeque.#$e#Damn, I could really go for some food.
Entries.summer_Sun: I got these new shoes yesterday 'cuz my old pair had a brown smudge.#$b#I just threw them into the garbage. I would've donated them but I don't like the idea of some random weirdo wearing my shoes, ya know?#$e#...What?$a
Entries.summer_Sun4: Oh wow... your shoes are a little dirty... but that's fine, too!#$e#Different people have different tastes, I guess.
Entries.summer_Thu4: Hey, you look like you're getting into some good shape this summer!#$b#All that farm work is paying off, huh?
Entries.summer_Fri6: Sorry my room is so messy.$s#$e#It's just hard to always remember to clean. I'm trying to get better, though.
Entries.summer_Wed8: You know, I actually wouldn't mind being a farmer... it seems a lot like training, in a way.#$e#I like being outdoors and doing things with my hands.
Entries.summer_Sat10: I've been trying to do more reading lately... I feel like I've been neglecting my brain for years because I was so obsessed with training.
Entries.fall_1: Sure, it's getting colder... But it's still warm enough to train!#$e#That's all I care about.
Entries.fall_Mon: My grandma told me I should spend more time studying.#$e#I was like, '...Grams, don't worry. I'm gonna become Hokage!'$h#$e#But... maybe studying isn't such a bad idea.
Entries.fall_Wed: Hey, I want to ask you something.^Hey, can I ask you something?#$e#$q 54/55 fall_Wed_01_old#What do you think about my hair?#$r 54 30 fall_Wed_01_01#It looks good the way it is.#$r 55 -30 fall_Wed_01_02#It looks ridiculous.
Entries.fall_Wed_01_old: I put too much stuff in my hair today. It kind of hurts.#$e#Don't touch it!#$e#...what?
Entries.fall_Wed_01_01: Yeah, I know. That's why I keep it like this.
Entries.fall_Wed_01_02: Yeah right. You're just jealous that I look this good.
Entries.fall_Thu: What's up?#$e#Isn't your name, like, %firstnameletter%name, or something?#$e#Oh. It's @? Okay. Sorry.
Entries.fall_Fri: I'm going to do two hundred sit-ups tonight.#$b#I'm pretty dedicated, aren't I?$h#$e#Need anything else?
Entries.fall_Sat: I think you can find salmon in the river this time of year.#$e#At least that's what I heard.
Entries.fall_Sun: Hey, the gridball game is on today!#$e#Sundays are pretty awesome in the fall.$u
Entries.fall_Fri6: I'm going to do a ton of sit-ups tonight.#$e#You have to work really hard if you want to achieve your maximum potential.
Entries.fall_Mon4: My grandma told me I should spend more time studying.#$e#Maybe she's right...$s
Entries.fall_Wed8: I finally took the plunge... I've decided to stop messing with my hair so much.#$e#I wouldn't want to be friends with someone who only liked me because of something that dumb.
Entries.winter_1: Winter is kind of lame. There's too much snow to do anything fun.#$e#I guess some people like it.
Entries.winter_Mon: You like the snow? Me... I'm just looking forward to spring.
Entries.winter_Tue: Hey, can you go find Haley and tell her I said 'hi'?
Entries.winter_Tue_inlaw_Haley: Oh, hey. How's the married life coming along?$9
Entries.winter_Wed: People stay indoors a lot during the winter, and do boring stuff.$s#$e#Maybe if I read a book I'd be less bored... nah.
Entries.winter_Thu: When I become Hokage, I'll be so busy traveling that boring winters won't get to me.#$e#Still... a warm place sounds pretty nice.
Entries.winter_Fri: You came all the way through the snow to see me?#$e#I guess that makes sense.
Entries.winter_Sat: There's some weird people living in this town.#$e#...like that guy Sebastian. Why does he wear black all the time?#$e#I don't get it.
Entries.winter_Sun: Hey, the gridball game is on today!#$e#This might be my favorite day of the week.
Entries.winter_Fri4: You came all the way through the snow to see me?#$e#That's nice of you.$h
Entries.winter_Sat6: I guess it's interesting that some people are totally different than us, you know?#$b#I don't always understand why others act the way they do, but that's fine.
Entries.winter_Tue4: Hey, @. Could you do me a favor?$l#$b#If you see Haley, tell her I'm busy.$l#$e#Thanks.
Entries.winter_Tue4_inlaw_Haley: I'll admit... I was a little jealous when you and Haley got married. But, hey... It's a chance for me to learn something new about myself.$9
Entries.winter_Wed8: You know what? I'm going to start reading a book!
Entries.winter_Thu6: I wish I could control the weather.
Entries.winter_Thu10: If I ever make a lot of money, I'll make sure all my friends and family are taken care of.#$e#That means you, too.$h
